name: Swing 365 Golf
address: 10600 S Pennsylvania Ave Ste 11, Oklahoma City, OK 73170
about: Swing 365 Golf is a private, members-only indoor golf simulator venue with two locations in Oklahoma City. It offers 24/7 access to private simulator suites equipped with professional-grade Full Swing simulators, allowing golfers to practice and play year-round without weather restrictions. The facility provides a premium, uncrowded environment with no walk-ins, ensuring consistent conditions and clean rooms. Memberships operate on a month-to-month, flat-rate model with various tiers offering daily time allocations ranging from one to two hours.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to private, members-only simulator rooms
No hourly fees; flat monthly rate model
Option to bring food and drinks to sessions
Private, uncrowded environment with no walk-ins

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring their own food; no food or beverage service is provided.
Members can bring their own drinks; no alcohol service is provided.

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade technology used by PGA Tour professionals, featuring a larger hitting area, real golf balls, and immediate, no-lag feedback.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes. Members must bring their own golf clubs. The facility uses real golf balls and allows members to use the provided balls or bring their own for consistent practice.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes. All outside food and drinks are welcome. The venue does not offer food or beverage service, so members can bring whatever they would like to enjoy during their session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator software and the player's pace, as it is not explicitly specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes. The facility is described as kid-friendly, clean, and inviting, making it suitable for families. Private rooms ensure no judgment, just improvement for golfers of all skill levels.
